title: Extraction Method D (PRP and RM)
author: Faezah Mohd Salleh
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.indcda6

steps.instruction: Digestion of ca. 50 mg sample with Buffer ATL (Qiagen, Hilden, DE) and Proteinase K overnight at 56 °C. undetermined, Buffer ATL Incubation was performed with rotation of the samples in an oven.
After pelleting remaining material, remove the supernatant and add to Buffer AL and ethanol.
Transfer the solution to DNeasy Mini spin column (Qiagen, Hilden, DE)
DNA purification following manufacturer's protocol with Buffer AW1 and Buffer AW2 (Qiagen, Hilden, DE).
Prior to elution, incubate DNA in the membrane with elution Buffer AE for 20 min at 37 °C. 00:20:00, Incubation at 37 °C
Proceed elution by centrifugation at 8000 rpm for 1 min. 00:01:00, Centrifugation
Prior to library construction, analyze small aliquots of each extract on Nanodrop (Thermo Fischer Scientific, Darmstadt, DE) for estimation of DNA concentration.
